creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Luca. Could you please:

- Separate the fix from the update (into separate attachments), so that the former (fix) can be MFH'd to the quarterly branch.

- In patches, add a comment in the header describing the issue/fix, and upstream references if available (bug/commit links, etc).

- Confirm the change passes QA (portlint, poudriere)
